articles.description: CBSE has extended the deadline for Class 12 students to apply for scanned copies of their evaluated answer sheets until May 25, 2026, to provide sufficient time. This has sparked a significant political battle ahead of the midterm elections. The controversy is intensifying as lawmakers return from recess, with Democrats also planning to challenge the fund. The outcome could impact upcoming elections.

articles.title: Campaigning ends in Colombia as left fights to stay in power
articles.description: Campaigning for Colombia's May 31 presidential elections wrapped up Sunday, with the left battling to hold on to power during a dramatic uptick in violence. articles.title: BJP plunged country into ‚Äėeconomic crisis‚Äô: Akhilesh

articles.title: Bihar lags in PNG rollout as Centre plans LPG-free zones
articles.description: Bihar has achieved only 31.2% of its piped natural gas (PNG) connection target set for completion by March by the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) even as the Centre plans to notify liquefied petroleum gas (LPG)-free zones amid concerns over supply disruptions and rising import costs due to the ongoing West Asia conflict, officials said on Sunday.

articles.description: A dramatic confrontation erupted at the United Nations Security Council as representatives from the United States and United Kingdom sharply condemned Russia over the ongoing war in Ukraine during a heated and emotional debate.

articles.title: Women killed after husband attacks her with TV set in Thane, accused held
articles.description: Thane Murder: A domestic dispute in Thane's Balyani area led to a tragic crime where husband Satish Waghe allegedly murdered his wife by smashing a TV on her head. Police arrested him post-incident, marking a critical case under murder charges.

articles.title: MPESB announces Skill Test and document verification dates for Subedar and ASI posts; download admit card here
articles.description: MPESB recruitment 2026: MPESB recruitment 2026: The Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board has announced the Skill Test and Document Verification schedule for recruitment to 500 Subedar and Assistant Sub-Inspector posts. The process will be conducted in Bhopal from June 2 to June 4, 2026, for candidates who cleared the written examination. The recruitment stage includes stenography and typing tests, Aadhaar e-KYC verification, and document checks. Candidates must download the information letter from the official website and report with original certificates and self-attested photocopies.

articles.title: Cracks Surface On Bihar‚Äôs Araria Bridge After Pillar Subsides, Heavy Traffic Barred
articles.description: Authorities in Bihar‚Äôs Araria district have restricted heavy traffic on the Jhamta Mahishakol bridge after one of its pillars reportedly subsided, causing visible cracks in the structure. Built in 2022, the bridge is a crucial link for several flood-affected villages. Officials have directed the contractor to repair the damage as concerns rise over repeated bridge failures in Bihar.

articles.title: Ebola Outbreak: India Issues Travel Advisory For 3 African Nations
articles.description: The Indian government has taken precautionary measures to reduce possible health risks and protect travellers. India has also confirmed that no case linked to this Ebola strain has been reported in...

articles.description: Also known as the Southern Tigers, JDT beat Kuching City FC 2-0 in the final to win their fourth consecutive Malaysia Cup title.

articles.description: The tenant mentioned that they wish they could tell the landlord that the electricity is not free. "I'm in fact paying WAY too much for a flat like that," they said.

articles.title: Ex-Meta employee shares viral post claiming non-Chinese workers felt targeted during mass layoffs
articles.description: A former Meta engineer has detailed feelings of social and professional isolation within certain teams, claiming non-Chinese employees were excluded due to colleagues predominantly speaking Mandarin. He contrasted this with a positive experience in South Korea, where English was used to include him. The engineer emphasized he is not targeting the Chinese community.

articles.title: Karnataka, Bengaluru weather update: Bangalore to receive rain, thunderstorms till May 25; IMD warns of intense showers across state
articles.description: Weather in Bengaluru: Bengaluru is under a yellow alert for intense rainfall until May 25, with thunderstorms and lightning expected. Pre-monsoon showers will continue across Karnataka, bringing cloudy skies and light to moderate rain to multiple districts. Some areas may experience heavy downpours and gusty winds, impacting daily life and travel.
